description: Deed of sale for a property. Location: Alexandria. Dated: Tuesday, 17 Nisan 5338 AM, which is 1578 CE. Seller: Yosef מושודו. Buyer: Binyamin אלרייאש. Price: 10 Venetian ducats. The property borders that of Yosef Sultani and is across from that of Masʿūd al-Djerbi. One witness is משה אג'ימאן, the other signs their name in Latin script, possibly beginning with the first-persion "io" from Italian. There is a join somewhere, shelfmark not listed in FGP. Possibly in the scribal hand of Eliyya b. David Ḥabariyya, who was active in Cairo during the late 1550s and early 1560s. (ASE/MCD with information from Dotan Arad.)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
